title: LeaveAndJoinMsges
description: Adds different leave and join messages
body:
# Custom leave and join messages in minecraft!

This plugin makes join and leave messages shorter for easier understanding.

# Messages:
![[+] pawPatoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e91cf0b192f70114888f9e4777138192d14e735.jpeg)
![[-] pawPatoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae4300129c02c2b3ecb2e75e90a90c9d25764ef1.jpeg)
